rationale: Brain & Cognitive at L3 needs to split by cognitive function (attention, memory, decision) and by domain (vision, audition, language) without doubling up. I kept the bigger Systems-Neuroscience-style leaves (circuits, sensorimotor, decision making) and the cognitive-psychology-style leaves (attention, executive function) separate even where the underlying topic overlaps, because the journals and methods differ. Replication & Open-Science gets its own leaf because Many-Labs / Many-Analysts papers form a distinct community.

subfields.name: Neural Circuit Recording & Optogenetics
subfields.tagline: Large-scale electrophysiology, calcium imaging, circuit manipulation.

subfields.name: Sensorimotor Systems
subfields.tagline: Motor cortex, sensorimotor learning, sensory coding.

subfields.name: Neural Basis of Decision & Action
subfields.tagline: Decision-making circuits, evidence accumulation, basal ganglia.

subfields.name: Value & Reward Circuits
subfields.tagline: Dopamine, VTA, OFC, reinforcement signals in vivo.

subfields.name: Hippocampus & Memory Circuits
subfields.tagline: Place cells, replay, memory engrams, spatial coding.

subfields.name: Human fMRI & Cognition
subfields.tagline: Cognitive fMRI, naturalistic paradigms, encoding models.

subfields.name: EEG/MEG & Time-Resolved Cognition
subfields.tagline: ERP/MEG, time-frequency analysis, multivariate decoding.

subfields.name: Intracranial Human Neuroscience
subfields.tagline: iEEG/ECoG, single-unit human recording, sEEG cognition.

subfields.name: Neuroimaging Methods & Connectomics
subfields.tagline: MRI methods, connectivity analysis, whole-brain mapping.

subfields.name: Neural Network Models of Cognition
subfields.tagline: DNN models of brain, recurrent network models, training brain-like nets.

subfields.name: Neural Coding & Information Theory
subfields.tagline: Population coding, information theory of neurons, mixed selectivity.

subfields.name: Learning Rules & Synaptic Plasticity Theory
subfields.tagline: Biologically plausible learning rules, three-factor rules, STDP models.

subfields.name: Attention & Cognitive Control
subfields.tagline: Attention, executive function, task switching, distraction.

subfields.name: Memory (Cognitive)
subfields.tagline: Working memory, episodic memory, retrieval, recognition.

subfields.name: Perception — Vision & Audition
subfields.tagline: Visual perception, auditory perception, multisensory integration.

subfields.name: Judgment & Decision Making
subfields.tagline: Decision under uncertainty, prospect theory in behavior, heuristics.

subfields.name: Language Comprehension (Behavioral)
subfields.tagline: Reading, sentence processing, pragmatics, prediction in language.

subfields.name: Infant Cognition
subfields.tagline: Object permanence, social cognition in infants, statistical learning.

subfields.name: Child Language Acquisition
subfields.tagline: Word learning, grammar acquisition, bilingual development.

subfields.name: Social-Emotional Development
subfields.tagline: Theory of mind, prosocial development, attachment research.

subfields.name: Adolescent Brain & Behavior
subfields.tagline: Adolescent risk-taking, brain maturation, social neuroscience in adolescents.

subfields.name: Intergroup Relations & Prejudice
subfields.tagline: Implicit bias, prejudice reduction, intergroup contact.

subfields.name: Social Cognition
subfields.tagline: Person perception, stereotype, attribution, mentalizing.

subfields.name: Morality & Prosocial Behavior
subfields.tagline: Moral judgment, cooperation, dictator games, fairness.

subfields.name: Social Influence & Behavior Change
subfields.tagline: Persuasion, conformity, nudges in social context.

subfields.name: Depression & Mood Disorders (Clinical Psychology)
subfields.tagline: Depression psychotherapy, mood disorder treatments, transdiagnostic models.

subfields.name: Anxiety, OCD & PTSD
subfields.tagline: Anxiety treatment, exposure, trauma-focused therapy.

subfields.name: Psychotherapy Process & Outcome
subfields.tagline: Therapy mechanisms, outcomes meta-research, transdiagnostic frameworks.

subfields.name: Child & Adolescent Clinical Psychology
subfields.tagline: Child psychopathology, school-based interventions, family therapy.

subfields.name: Emotion Regulation & Interoception
subfields.tagline: Regulation strategies, interoception, affective dynamics.

subfields.name: Emotion Perception & Recognition
subfields.tagline: Facial emotion, affective prosody, emotion in context.

subfields.name: Dementia Cognition & Neuropsych
subfields.tagline: Cognitive markers of AD/FTD, neuropsych for dementia, lesion-deficit.

subfields.name: Substance Use & Reward Neuroscience
subfields.tagline: Animal models of addiction, human reward neuroimaging.

subfields.name: Sleep, Memory & Cognition
subfields.tagline: Sleep-dependent memory, sleep architecture and cognition.

subfields.name: Replication & Meta-Science
subfields.tagline: Many-labs studies, meta-analyses, registered reports methodology.

subfields.name: Language Acquisition & Processing
subfields.tagline: First-language acquisition, sentence parsing, bilingualism — eye-tracking, corpora, behavioral experiments.

subfields.name: Neurolinguistics
subfields.tagline: Aphasia, language networks, neural codes for syntax/semantics — fMRI, MEG, ERP, intracranial recordings.

subfields.name: Comparative Cognition
subfields.tagline: Tool use, numerical cognition, social cognition across species.

subfields.name: Animal Communication & Cognitive Evolution
subfields.tagline: Signal evolution, vocal learning, cognitive evolution — bioacoustics, ethology, phylogenetic comparative methods.

uncovered_concerns: Psycholinguistics & Language Science L2 has 'Language Comprehension' as its main L3 representative; deeper splits (bilingualism, reading specifically) fold there.
Comparative & Evolutionary Cognition L2 has no L3 leaves — small at this depth; folds across reward/learning leaves with the species as context.
